name: Pike
description: Formation reach, bracing, and work in the push.

name: Sword
description: Close violence when the line breaks.

name: Arquebus
description: Firearm handling under smoke and rain.

name: Discipline
description: Holding formation, obeying orders, surviving fear.

name: Vigor
description: Marching, carrying, healing, and taking blows.

name: Cunning
description: Reading danger, cheating death, spotting chances.
